original_filename: Barcuai (2026) - ChatGPT as a cognitive crutch.pdf

decisions.reason: Barcaui (2026, Heliyon) — RCT on ChatGPT as cognitive crutch + knowledge retention. Same finding shape as Liu (2026) and Bastani (2025) which are stronger and now in KB. Skip in favor of those.

Re-promoted from SKIP to DEFER per user feedback (corroborating sources strengthen the KB). Barcaui (2026, Heliyon) — RCT on ChatGPT crutch behavior + knowledge retention. Brazilian-context replication of the same finding shape as Liu and Bastani; corroborating evidence at different population. Defer.
